calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-09-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-15-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Elizabeth McDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Hartford Casualty Insurance Company, a corporation, as subrogee of Floordesigns, Inc.
James Cherry, Accountant and Custodian of Records for Floordesigns, Inc.
No appearance by defendant John D. Edwards.
Amended Default entered against defendant on April 4, 2008.
Doe defendants dismissed today, April 15, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff Hartford Casualty Insurance Company, a corporation, as subrogee of Floordesigns, Inc., and against the Defaulted Defendant John D. Edwards as follows:

Damages/Principal - $45,952.00.
Prejudgment Interest- $9,638.14.
Costs $610.20, for a total of $56,200.34.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-11-2008 Continued To May-16-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
